subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The Day of praise and glorification hath indeed come, and therein doth the Concourse on High rejoice, yet most of the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد اتی یوم الحمد و الثناء و فیه استفرح الملا الاعلی ولکن القوم اکثرهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the concourse on high, @suffering and imprisonment
